calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Rees Morgan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff LMX Properties, Inc.
Order waiving appearance of live witness is in the court's file
Copy of Declaration by Plaintiff's Witness Terrence Walker presented in open court.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Siemer & Hang Travel, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages - $110,791.78
Attorney fees - $11161.00
Costs - $1437.29.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $123,390.07
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
